since_last: 60% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +4.88%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 60% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.03% · BTC +2.81% · Gold +1.39% · Nasdaq100 -1.13%. 60% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +4.88%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +4.88%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.69%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: KLAC is the standout at -12.48%
cards.body: Leaders: APP +10.53%, CRWD +9.56%, META +9.34%, PLTR +9.21%, SNAP +7.21%. Laggards: KLAC -12.48%, LRCX -11.00%, TER -10.77%, AMAT -10.15%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -7.59% at $157.9
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -7.59% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
